daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. There's this restless energy pushing you toward something new, and honestly? That's the universe telling you it's time to shake things up. Trust the urge.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person's probably feeling your intensity today—use it to have a real conversation. Single? Someone's definitely noticing your main character energy.
daily.career: That project or idea you've been sitting on? Today's giving 'speak up' energy. Your confidence is legit, and people can feel it. This is your moment to pitch or propose something bold.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement, not rest. Whether it's a walk, dancing, or hitting the gym, get that energy flowing. You'll feel so much clearer afterward.

weekly.overview: Your energy's shifting this week, Aries. Mercury's got you feeling introspective, which honestly? Needed. You're picking up on vibes others miss. Trust your gut when something feels off, and don't force connections that aren't reciprocating.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your love language rn. Real talk over brunch hits different. Single? Stop swiping and actually engage with people in your orbit. The magic's in genuine conversation, not endless scrolling.
weekly.career: You're itching for change and your instincts are kinda fire about it. Pitch that idea you've been sitting on—timing's actually decent. Just come with receipts, not just vibes. Your confidence is contagious when backed by prep work.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down. This week's about quality over quantity—one killer workout beats forcing it daily. Sleep's your secret weapon. Also? Your nervous system needs some actual downtime, not just phone silence. Journal, breathe, exist.
